name: Antonio Ciacca
abstract: Antonio Ciacca is a German-born jazz pianist.

about_quotes.speaker: Benny Golson
about_quotes.evidence: I had a couple in Italy: Massimo Faraò and Antonio Ciacca, who’s now a big man in Lincoln Center.
